articles.author: Jill Lawless
articles.title: ‘Saturday Night Live UK’ aims to take a comedy hit across the pond. The first verdicts are in - AP News
articles.description: A British version of “Saturday Night Live” has debuted to largely positive reviews. The first episode of “SNL UK” was hosted by Tina Fey, a veteran of the American show, and stuck closely in format to the U.S. original. It mixed topical sketches, fake ads and…
articles.content:
LONDON (AP) Saturday Night Live has crossed the pond with a mild splash.
A British offshoot of the 51-year-old U.S. comedy institution has debuted to generally positive reviews, defying doomsayers w… [+2894 chars]

articles.author: Christopher Rugaber
articles.title: Trump touted bigger tax refunds this year, but Americans will likely spend them on gas - AP News
articles.description: Spiking gas prices in the U.S. are on track to eat up tax refunds this year, leaving most Americans with little extra to spend. Oil and gas prices have soared since the start of the Iran war. The nationwide average price of gas is $3.94 a gallon, up nearly a …
articles.content: WASHINGTON (AP) The U.S. economy was supposed to start the year with a bang, fueled by an unusually large jump in tax refunds from President Donald Trumps tax cut legislation. Yet spiking gas prices … [+5250 chars]
